headline: Level Up Your Consulting Game: Master Data, Automate Excel & Pick the Right Tools

stories.title: Emotional Intelligence (EQ): The Secret Weapon Consultants Are Sleeping On
stories.summary: Emotional intelligence is lowkey the most underrated skill for consultants in 2026—being able to read your clients, manage tough conversations, and build actual trust moves the needle way more than just having the smartest framework.
stories.takeaway: Invest in EQ: it's literally how you turn advice into results that stick.

stories.title: GPT for Excel: Stop Doing Manual Work & Let AI Handle Your Data Grunt Work
stories.summary: Use GPT for Excel's natural language prompts to automate text translation, data classification, and database creation—basically tell it what you want and it just does it across entire datasets.
stories.takeaway: Prompt-based automation is fr changing how consultants handle repetitive data tasks; can save hours every week.

stories.title: Rocketlane: The Consulting Project Management Tool That Actually Gets It
stories.summary: Rocketlane is built specifically for consulting workflows—handles staffing, financials, and client collab in one place, plus AI-powered resource allocation keeps your team from burning out.
stories.takeaway: Tbh, generic PM tools fall short for consultants; Rocketlane solves the profitability + resource mess that keeps teams up at night.

watchNext.title: Why Adaptability is Your Consulting Superpower in 2026
watchNext.why: The landscape's shifting fast—consultants who pivot quick stay relevant; worth a 3-min read to stay ahead.

watchNext.title: AI Tools Every Consultant Should Know (The Realistic Edition)
watchNext.why: ChatGPT, Tableau AI, Think Cell—here's which AI tools actually move the needle for consulting vs the hype machines.
